    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen

    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    Main
     
    Stack<T>
    Generic stack class The last element that is pushed onto the stack is the first element that will be removed.
    StackEmptyException
    Exception that is thrown when pop or peek is used on an empty stack.
    StackFullException
    Exception that is thrown when an element is pushed onto a full stack.
